title: lupinus grayi var. medius
intro: Lupinus grayi var. medius, also known as Gray's lupine, is a perennial herbaceous plant of the lupine genus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lupinus grayi var. medius include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in detoxification and promote skin health. Herbal preparations of Lupinus grayi var. medius often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
